setup_task.sh mixing_bay_browser_spec.txt generation and verifier.py WHITELIST_AUDIO_DOMAINS list
setup_task.sh cookie injection logic and verifier.py has_corrupted check
setup_task.sh mixing_bay_browser_spec.txt generation and cookie injection array

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Chrome profile configured via setup_task.sh. All metadata claims exactly match the scripts: target_download_dir is '/home/ga/Audio/SFX_Downloads', whitelist_audio_domains are freesound.org, splice.com, soundsnap.com, and epidemicsound.com, corrupted_cookie_domains are freesound.org and splice.com, and control_cookie_domains include youtube.com and reddit.com. I discovered a critical defect: setup_task.sh attempts to insert cookies into SQLite using invalid Python-interpolated SQL syntax (`'corrupted' if d in ['freesound.org', 'splice.com'] else 'valid'`), causing an SQLite syntax error ('near

: syntax error'). Consequently, the cookies are never injected into the profile, making the task programmatically unscorable because verifier.py strictly requires the control cookies (e.g., youtube) to exist at task completion.
